subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of Baha'u'llah! That Essence, sanctified and holy, the Ever-Living and Self-Subsisting One, from the throne of His celestial dominion and the court of His almighty power, in every [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان بهاء الله آن ذات سبوح قدوس حی قیوم از سریر ملکوت و سده جبروت در هر
